programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Copper caper with Nicolas Cage and Elijah Wood. When two less than honourable cops discover a bail receipt worth a lot of money, they go in search of the source of the cash. (2016)
Mannering agrees to help British intelligence take down a ring of art thieves hiding behind diplomatic immunity.
Steed believes he has finally cracked a case when he captures his nemesis. But when things go awry, the team and a member of the royal family suddenly find themselves in grave danger .
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Western starring John Wayne, Maureen O'Hara and Patrick Wayne. A wealthy rancher must navigate warring factions in the Wild West while also fighting to save his troubled marriage. (1963)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

The Avengers are forced to solve a jigsaw puzzle when its pieces appear in the hands of dead men. Steed and Tara find themselves at the mercy of someone known as the Games Master.
Steed investigates a top-level blackmailer whose victims have either been killed or lost the ability to tell the truth. Can Steed trust anyone involved in the case, including Tara?
John Cannon risks breaking a mutual defence agreement with Victoria's father and dissolving his marriage when his ranch hands join a posse searching for marauding bandits in Mexico.
All-star western with Charlton Heston and Richard Harris. A Union major assembles an army of renegades and POWs to hunt down murderous Apaches - but can sworn enemies ever be brothers in arms? (1965)

Western with George Montgomery and Karin Booth. Two agents are sent to Cripple Creek, posing as Texas gunfighters. Their task? Infiltrate a gang of gold-smuggling outlaws (1952).

Clay Hollister investigates how the rope used to hang Reed Barker broke.
An Apache renegade and his followers plan to kill Cochise's peace representative in the Cannon ranch house and start a new Indian war.
When Julie is murdered her friend Pekoe helps the Persuaders in their investigation that will expose a plot of familial murder and asset theft.
Tara visits Steed who is incapacitated in hospital with a broken leg. Little does she know she has led an old nemesis to Steed who is eager to extract their vengeance on him.
Steed receives a jewelled dagger, known as the Falcon, whose power lies in the ability to lead its owner to a sought after black pearl. However, every previous owner has died prematurely.
Freefalling action with Charlie Sheen, Nastassja Kinski and James Gandolfini. A maverick skydiving instructor becomes entangled in a murderous conspiracy involving Soviet spies and lost gold. (1994)

Cataclysmic thriller starring Robin Dunne. A physicist's experiment with a super collider opens a rift to an alternate reality, unleashing consequences that threaten the entire human race (2013).
The Baron finds himself an inadvertent and unwilling accomplice in a large-scale jewel robbery.
The team are tasked with investigating the whereabouts of a stolen rocket from a munitions warehouse. Meanwhile, Purdey experiences a tense encounter with her ex-boyfriend .
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Romance starring Gary Cooper and Helen Hayes. A passionate romance blooms between a wounded American soldier and a brave nurse amidst the chaos and heartache of World War I (1932).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.

WWII airborne action starring Steve McQueen and Robert Wagner. Stationed in Britain, reckless pilot Buzz Rickson's behaviour threatens his reputation of always bringing his crew home alive (1962).

Western with Bill Williams. A former Confederate soldier and a Union officer journey a herd of cattle across America, fighting Apaches and bandits along the way (1955).

After yet another mine shaft disaster, Sheriff Hollister wages a campaign for mine safety legislation.
After witnessing a murder, Adam Kirby finds that killer is coming after him too.
Billy Blue Cannon faces possible hanging when he is court-martialled on the charge of killing an army general's son.
Danny hears a suspicious noise in some woodlands and discovers a dead body. But by the time he has dragged Brett back to see it, the body has mysteriously vanished.
An enemy agent imprisons Steed and creates a doppelganger of him to jeopardise a peace conference. Tara faces a race against time to locate the real Steed before disaster strikes.
Tara visits a quaint hotel to collect her uncle after he fails to return home. But she soon realises that she and the other guests may never be allowed to leave alive.
Action thriller with Gary Dourdan, Serinda Swan and Andy Garcia. A war hero embarks on a daring rescue mission when his wife is kidnapped. As the clock counts down, can he get to her in time? (2021)

Action thriller with Steven Seagal. A former federal agent helps a mysterious woman steal money from a sadistic drug lord, but can he survive the deadly game of cat and mouse that follows? (2016)
